fwd60_stride60.caveat: q>1: rank-deficient corr matrix; participation ratio is a noise-biased LOWER bound; naive equicorr is the upper bound

fwd5_stride5_proxy.role: well-conditioned estimate of the cross-sectional dependence structure; horizon-independent to first order

conclusion.note: excess labels remove the market mode; residual factor structure (sectors/styles) is what cuts N_eff below N. sqrt(BR_eff) is the IR multiplier in IR = TC*IC*sqrt(BR)
